ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: protestchat uses Bluetooth Low Energy to find nearby phones and pass messages between them directly, so they travel without a cell tower or the internet. Nothing about you is broadcast: the Bluetooth identifier is random and changes every 15 minutes.
ios.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: protestchat advertises over Bluetooth Low Energy so nearby phones can find this one and relay messages without the internet. The advertised identifier is random and changes every 15 minutes.
ios.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: protestchat uses the local network to exchange messages directly with nearby devices.
